title: Blueprint Code Review Model
description: Model-authored payload for review.code-review. Runtime-owned phase metadata, scope files, depth, source, evidence inventory, severity counts, paths, and Markdown rendering are supplied by MCP tools.

reviewSummary.description: Concrete review outcome notes written by the model. Do not include MCP-owned depth, source, file count, or path metadata.
examples: The reviewed source path preserves the happy path but leaves negative input behavior uncovered.

positiveSignals.description: Concrete pass evidence, safeguards, tests, or coverage strengths observed during review.
examples: The saved plan and summary agree on the bounded source and test scope.

findings.description: Line-backed review findings. Empty is allowed only when the verdict and follow-up fields are consistent with a pass.

examples.evidence: The changed branch accepts negative input without a guard.
examples.impact: Callers can receive a misleading success result for invalid input.
examples.recommendation: Add an explicit negative-input guard and a focused regression test.

evidenceCoverage.description: Coverage decisions keyed by exact known evidence artifact paths returned by blueprint_review_scope.authoringContext. The task schema narrows this to exhaustive exact keys.

.blueprint/phases/05-review-scope/05-01-.rationale: Plan metadata defined the source files and acceptance criteria reviewed.
Summary evidence confirmed the completed delivery increment.

followUps.description: Actionable fix, test, validation, or explicit no-follow-up statement consistent with verdict and findings.
examples: Add a negative-input regression test before shipping.

nextSafeAction.description: One exact command string from the allowedNextActions list in the authoring context. The task schema narrows this to the current phase.

nonEmptyString.description: Non-empty single-line Markdown-safe text. CR/LF is rejected so model-authored bullets and finding fields cannot inject extra list items or headings.

verdict.description: Overall review posture inferred by the model from inspected code and evidence.

lineLocation.description: Repo-relative file:line or file:line-line citation. The task schema narrows the file portion to the resolved review scope.
